Title: ParcelPro location select - Scenario 1
Preconditions: As a user visiting the ParcelPro website, I want to navigate from the home page to the Global page and select India – English under Asia & India Subcontinent, so that I can view region-specific content relevant to my location and language preference.
Test Steps: The application should successfully load the home page when the user launches https://parcelpro3.ams1907.com.
Expected Result: The application should successfully load the home page when the user launches https://parcelpro3.ams1907.com.

Title: ParcelPro location select - Scenario 2
Preconditions: As a user visiting the ParcelPro website, I want to navigate from the home page to the Global page and select India – English under Asia & India Subcontinent, so that I can view region-specific content relevant to my location and language preference.
Test Steps: The header should display a language/region selector showing “United States – English” with a dropdown arrow.
Expected Result: The header should display a language/region selector showing “United States – English” with a dropdown arrow.

Title: ParcelPro location select - Scenario 3

Expected Result: The system should navigate to the Global page at https://www.parcelpro.com/us/en/global.html.
